criteria.name: correctness
criteria.description: Routine CRUD, timer sequencing, persistence, streak, XP, and achievement rules work as specified.

criteria.name: completeness
criteria.description: MVP includes timer engine, streaks, XP/level, dashboard, achievements, and visual progression.

criteria.name: edge_cases
criteria.description: Handles empty routines, zero/invalid durations, pause/reset/skip, deleting selected routines, and first-run data.

criteria.name: craft
criteria.description: UX feels like a real app, is responsive, readable, and avoids overlap or decorative clutter.
